name: Woo Dip Har - Butterfly Prawns
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chinese wine or dry sherry (optional)
1/2 cup Corn flour (I assume this is cornstarch?)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and de-vein the prawns, leaving the tails on.
2. Using a sharp knife, slit each prawn along the curve of its back but do not cut all the way through.
3. Combine the wine (or dry sherry), soy sauce, crushed garlic, salt, and grated ginger in a bowl.
4. Marinate the prawns in this mixture for 15 minutes.
5. Dredge the prawns first in corn flour, shaking off any excess, then dip them into beaten egg.
6. Finally, coat the prawns with breadcrumbs.
7. Press gently to flatten the prawns and ensure they are well coated in crumbs.
8. Heat the peanut oil in a frying pan or pot.
9. Fry the prawns, 2 or 3 at a time, until golden brown, about 2 minutes.
10. Remove from the oil with tongs or a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper.
11. Serve hot with chili sauce if desired.
